openViolations.note: onToggleSolution: mutateRevealCodingSolution trong try/catch{} rỗng → lỗi mạng/auth im lặng. Bọc runGraphQL (toast) hoặc SWR-mutation hook. BUG UX.
Cả file không SWR: import queryContentComments + mutateCreateComment không runGraphQL/toast, state tự useState. Dựng SWR-hook tier content-comments + facade.
onSubmit gọi thẳng mutateSubmitCodingSolution, tự useState submitting, không runGraphQL. Chuyển useSWRMutation facade + runGraphQL + isMutating.
setValue(field, value: string|boolean|undefined) → setValue('rememberMe','abc') PASS type-check dù sai. Dùng generic <K extends Field>(field:K, value:State[K]). Cùng lỗi signUp/store.ts:59.
